name: What evidence do I need for on-the-job injury claim in West Jordan?
description: Medical records, reports, witnesses, photos, wages.[3]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for on-the-job injury claim in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, reports, witnesses, photos, wages.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Gather medical records, incident reports, witness statements, photos of scene/hazards, wage stubs, and employer communications to prove injury occurred at work and extent of damages. This builds causation and value.[3] Key factors: contemporaneous documentation strongest, expert testimony for complex injuries, maintenance logs for negligence. Preserve evidence immediately, request employer reports; lawyer subpoenas more. Solid proof maximizes benefits.
